name: Steve's Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cream butter and dark brown sugar in a mixing bowl until creamy.
3. Add eggs and vanilla, then mix well.
4. Stir in flour and baking soda; mix thoroughly.
5. Fold in chocolate chips. If the dough is too thick, add more all-purpose flour.
6. Scoop large spoonfuls of dough onto a lightly-greased baking sheet to form cookies that are big enough so you get about 2 dozen from this batch.
7. Place the cookies in the oven and bake for 10 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
